permutation.interpretation: p=0.038. Signal Sharpe is distinguishable from random day selection.

bootstrap.interpretation: Sharpe 0.749, 95% CI [-0.156, 1.790]. CI includes zero — Sharpe is not distinguishable from noise.

concentration.interpretation: Top 5 days account for 29.7% of total P&L (207 active days). P&L is reasonably distributed across trading days.
